title: Holy PVP
description: Use mods to build a Minecraft client that looks as well as performs.
body:
## Modpack is not scheduled to be updated unless an issue is filed in Github.




The ultimate optimized modpack for competition!

「In the smooth and silky graphics, experience the ultimate duel of swords and swords」


![banners](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18ef4c706b9366c89a6d90d1e9bddad20b8dbbf3.png) ### 🌟 Characteristic - **⚡ Performance** With Sodium, Lithium and other optimization modules, the optimization effect is even stronger than any dedicated PVP client. - **🎮 Fombat** Use Axolotl Client to restore PVP client features, button display, number of combos, CPS counter, and more... - **🌌 Vision** Includes GUI animations, chat animations, smooth transfer of items, smooth zooming, and more... - **🔧 compatible** Adaptation to version 1.21.4 through ViaFabricPlus, backward compatible with any version, module conflict rate < 0.1%. - **🍉 Customize** Made with pure mods, any mod can be installed/uninstalled according to your preference. - **📌 Fair** Only add visual content based on the original Minecraft and do not add any cheats. - **🔍 Update** Stay active and update as more will be revealed after the modpack update. ### 🔅Optimize comparisons - **CPU** I9-13900HX - **RAM** 32GB DDR5 5600MT/S (Use 2GB) - **GPU** NVIDIA RTX 4060 Laptop - **Seed** -7287181468024537628 **Holy PVP Modpack** ![Holy PVP ModPack FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55f4c885e44ad44ec463901417c4e664aa655d4d.png)\ **Lunar Client**(Sodium,EBE,Lithum,Modern UI,Entity Culling,Debugify) ![Lunar FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c27151d40eedcb9005d327dd1d29148eb06621b7.png) ### 📦 Gallery ![PVP Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d7b35e47317068ba67330d5742c082d85a867ed.jpeg) ![Hypixel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72f7379d750ec67f154f68c9e1b2d732bede8c29.png) ### 🧩 Included Mods
The latest version Due to the recent update content, please check the specific version changelog.
### 📣 Supported versions | Verison | state | Loader | Ins-Via | | :--- | :----: | :----: | :----: | | 26.1.2 | No | Fabric | Maybe | | 1.21.11 | No | Fabric | Maybe | | 1.21.6 | No | Fabric | Maybe | | 1.21.5 | No | Fabric | Maybe | | 1.21.4 | Archive | Fabric | Yes | | 1.21.1 | Plan | Fabric | Maybe | | 1.20.1 | Plan | Quilt | Maybe | | 1.16.5 | Plan | Fabric | No | | 1.12.2 | No | Ornithe Fabric| No | | 1.8.9 | Plan | Ornithe Fabric| No |
